# OSKOL-MET-TRADE LLC

> Russian B2B industrial company. Supplies metalworking equipment
> (CNC, robotic lines), metallurgical raw materials (ferrochrome,
> manganese ore, NPI), and industrial furnaces (vacuum, induction,
> gas). The industry experience of the team and the business founder
> dates back to 1994, when the founder's first companies began
> operating in metallurgy and industrial equipment. Consolidated
> experience of the team and the founder's companies includes
> participation in the supply of approximately 2,500 units of
> metalworking equipment. VSZ (Voronezh Machine Tool Plant) is a
> separate legal entity connected by common ownership whose
> manufacturing capabilities may be used for joint projects.
> INN: 3127508337. OGRN: 1033108702868.
> Geography of international experience: Russia, Belarus, Kazakhstan,
> China, India, Indonesia, Israel, Italy, Malaysia, Philippines.
